title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Dineout

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Dineout
jsonLd.description:
We at Dineout are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dineout:
Dineout is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout!
